opinion.h: 386 U.S. 270"> LOUISIANA ET AL. v. UNITED STATES. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE EASTERN DISTRICT OF LOUISIANA. No. 938. Decided March 13, 1967.
opinion.p: Jack P. F. Gremillion, Attorney General of Louisiana, and Thomas W. McFerrin and William P. Schuler, Assistant Attorneys General, for appellants.
Solicitor General Marshall, Assistant Attorney General Doar and Alan G. Marer for the United States.
The motion to affirm is granted and the judgment is affirmed.
MR. JUSTICE BLACK and MR. JUSTICE WHITE are of the opinion that probable jurisdiction should be noted and the case set for hearing.
